description: Accounts in the hand of ʿArūs b. Yosef. Mentioning goods such as pepper (filfil), oil (dihn), cumin (kammūn), bitumen (qifār), brazilwood (baqqam), sugar and syrup (sukkar wa-sharāb). Mentioning names such as Abū Naṣr, Abū 'Alī, al-Shaykh al-Itrābulsi, and Abū l-Qāsim. ASE.
tags: brazilwood, merchant, oil, pepper, syrup, sugar, account
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
